summary: Comprehensive testing of IV Analytics feature completed. All 16 requested features verified working. Backend: 18/18 tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements rendering correctly with proper charts and styling.

integration_issues.issue: Hydration warnings: <span> cannot be child of <select>, <option> - existing issue from Emergent visual editor wrapper spans
integration_issues.note: This is a known Emergent platform issue with visual editor wrapper spans, not a code bug

passed_tests: GET /api/iv/dashboard?underlying=NIFTY returns all required fields (atm_iv, india_vix, iv_rank, iv_percentile, historical_volatility, max_pain, iv_skew, seller_signal)
ATM IV is calculated correctly from option prices using Black-Scholes (20.27% for NIFTY - valid range 5-100%)
India VIX is fetched live from Angel One (token 99926017) - returned 15.79
Max Pain strike is calculated from OI distribution (23,400 - within 0.14% of spot 23,366.7)
Max Pain calculation correctly identifies strike with minimum total pain
IV Skew returns ce_iv and pe_iv for each strike with moneyness values
Seller signal returns 'NEUTRAL' with empty reasoning array (correct for building history)
IV snapshots are stored in MongoDB (iv_history_count = 1)
GET /api/iv/skew returns focused skew data with underlying, expiry, spot_price, atm_strike, atm_iv, skew array
GET /api/iv/max-pain returns max pain with pain distribution array
Frontend IV Analytics page renders with signal banner showing 'Neutral — Wait for Setup'
6 metric cards displayed: ATM IV, India VIX, IV Rank, IV Percentile, HV (20D), Max Pain
IV Smile/Skew chart shows green CE line (#22c55e) and red PE line (#ef4444)
Max Pain chart shows bars with purple highlight (#a855f7) at max pain strike
Sidebar has 'IV Analytics' navigation item with Gauge icon
Auto-refresh toggle works (10s interval) - toggles between 'Auto 10s' and 'Paused'
Options Seller's Guide section with 4 educational cards (IV Rank > 60%, IV Rank < 30%, IV > HV, Max Pain)
critical_code_review_comments: Black-Scholes implementation uses Newton-Raphson with Brent fallback - mathematically correct
Risk-free rate correctly set to 6.5% (India RBI repo rate)
IV stored as percentage (e.g., 20.27 means 20.27%) - consistent throughout
IV Rank/Percentile correctly show 'Building...' when history < 5 days - expected behavior
Max Pain calculation correctly minimizes total pain across all strikes
India VIX fetched from Angel One token 99926017 on NSE exchange
test_credentials: No credentials required - public platform with Angel One broker pre-connected
seed_data_creation: None required - IV snapshots auto-stored on API call
context_for_next_testing_agent: Angel One broker is connected and live. Market is closed (weekend). IV Rank/Percentile show 'Building...' because we just started storing daily snapshots — this is correct behavior (needs 5+ days of data). ATM IV = 20.27% for NIFTY. India VIX = 15.79. Max Pain = 23,400. All IV Analytics features verified working.

Backend API - GET /api/iv/dashboard.iv_skew: PASS - Array with ce_iv, pe_iv for each strike

Backend API - GET /api/iv/skew.Response structure: PASS - underlying, expiry, spot_price, atm_strike, atm_iv, skew
Backend API - GET /api/iv/skew.Skew data: PASS - strike, moneyness, ce_iv, pe_iv, ce_ltp, pe_ltp

Backend API - GET /api/iv/max-pain.Pain distribution: PASS - Array with strike and total_pain
Backend API - GET /api/iv/max-pain.Calculation: PASS - Max pain strike has minimum total_pain

Frontend UI.Signal banner: PASS - 'Neutral — Wait for Setup' with building message
Frontend UI.6 metric cards: PASS - ATM IV, India VIX, IV Rank, IV Percentile, HV, Max Pain
Frontend UI.IV Skew chart: PASS - Green CE line, Red PE line, ATM marker
Frontend UI.Max Pain chart: PASS - Bars with purple highlight at max pain
Frontend UI.Sidebar nav: PASS - IV Analytics with Gauge icon

MongoDB Storage.iv_snapshots collection: PASS - Stores daily ATM IV with date-based upsert
